---
title: "TRSE units: DRAGON"

# DRAGON

These paths are relative to `units/DRAGON/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `gfx/tiles`
- `screen`
- `system`
- `text`
